title: ASR Federal Leather Police Bifold RFID Wallet Badge Holder with Removable ID
description:
The ASR Federal Leather Police Bifold RFID Wallet Badge Holder with Removable ID Card Holder has been specifically designed for all private or public safety and security professionals who need their ID in one convenient location, and also for those, who at times, require discretion of their ID for undercover, covert or plainclothes operations. Importantly, the bifold wallet features Radio Frequency Identification (RFID) shield technology, preventing electronic pick-pocketing and identity theft, keeping your ID and credit cards safe and secure

ASR Federal Leather Police Bifold RFID Wallet Badge Holder with Removable ID

The ASR Federal Leather Police Bifold RFID Wallet Badge Holder with Removable ID Card Holder has been specifically designed for all private or public safety and security professionals who need their ID in one convenient location, and also for those, who at times, require discretion of their ID for undercover, covert or plainclothes operations. Importantly, the bifold wallet features Radio Frequency Identification (RFID) shield technology, preventing electronic pick-pocketing and identity theft, keeping your ID and credit cards safe and secure.

The ASR Federal badge holder RFID wallet features a clear removable card holder, as well as a built in clear ID card holder slot, a generous cash compartment, numerous credit card slots, a recessed badge cut-out mount—allowing your police badge to fit seamlessly in pockets without any extra added bulk—and lastly, an interior suede protection flap to keep badges scratch-free and add another layer of discretion when needed.

Key Features

  • RFID POLICE BADGE HOLDER WALLET: The ASR Federal credit card holder, ID and police badge holder bifold wallet comes with Radio Frequency Identification (RFID) shield technology, preventing electronic pick-pocketing and identity theft, keeping your ID and credit cards safe and secure at all times
  • BADGE HOLDER: This RFID wallet police badge holder features a recessed badge cut-out design that allows badges to fit seamlessly in the wallet without any extra added bulk; mounting is pin-back or clip back (no screws required)
  • SUEDE BADGE PROTECTION FLAP: The police badge holder and ID card holder features a built in suede badge protection flap to keep badges scratch free hidden from view if necessary in covert field situations; wallet also includes a removable ID card holder, cash compartment, credit card slots and built in ID card holder slot
  • GENUINE LEATHER MATERIAL: This badge holder boasts a strong and sturdy construction with reinforced stitching and a heavy gauge leather body; the badge holder will relax over time with use as it molds to your carrying habits, but will never forego its integrity and structure
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions 4.5 x 3.5 x 1 inches; Maximum Card Size: 2.75 x 4 inches; Color: Black; Material: Genuine Leather; Note: Badge attachment is clip back or pin back, no screws required; Maximum Badge Size: 2.75 inches

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 18208
  • UPC: 766359583549
  • Color: Black

Made from 100% genuine leather, this badge holder wallet boasts a strong and sturdy construction with reinforced stitching and a heavy gauge leather body; the badge holder will relax over time with use as it molds to your carrying habits, but will never forego its integrity and structure.

Badge attachment is clip-back or pin-back, no screws required. This RFID wallet is specifically designed for a round-shaped (circle) police badge. Please measure your own personal badge to ensure it fits with this badge holder RFID leather wallet. The maximum badge size for this badge holder wallet is: 2.75 inches.

NOTE: Badge is NOT included with purchase
